case_title: DONOVAN MARSHALL VS. ANDREI LOFMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK:DEFENDANT(THE WESTERN SURETY COMPANY) EXHIBITS RECEIVED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, DONOVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOFMAN, ANDREI DBA SF2 CONSTRUCTION THE WESTERN SURETY COMPANY $8,700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,000.00 FILED BY MARSHALL, DONOVAN AS TO DEFENDANT LOFMAN, ANDREI DBA SF2 CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE WESTERN SURETY COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF DONOVAN MARSHALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDREI LOFFMAN DBA SF2 CONSTRUCTION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANDREI LOFMAN. DEFENDANT THE WESTERN SURETY COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, DONOVAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, DONOVAN AS TO DEFENDANT THE WESTERN SURETY COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00<WAIVED>) SERVED FEB-27-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOFMAN, ANDREI DBA SF2 CONSTRUCTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2024 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOFMAN, ANDREI DBA SF2 CONSTRUCTION THE WESTERN SURETY COMPANY
